commands.lesson_title: Public T+30 chart features are exhausted as an edge source
commands.lesson_body: After ~150 strategies / 32,477 lifetime paper trades (-935.8 SOL, avg -5.9%/trade) on T+30 entries filtered by public features (velocity, monotonicity, holders, concentration, snipers, creator rep, path shape, regime, time-of-day, BTC/F&G), zero strategies cleared the promotion bar. Best survivor (v9shadow-velmono-dev +2.94 SOL, drop3 +1.20, n=104) is the max of ~150 trials - winner's-curse means true edge is smaller. The universe median pct_t300 is -11.7% and baseline avg -11.15%: filters reshape the loss, they do not reverse it. Redirect research effort to information-asymmetry signals (copy-trading smart wallets) instead of new public-feature combos. Exit-engineering variants (trailing/breakeven/ratchet/1s-poll: v32/v33/v34/v42/v43 families) never flipped a negative entry signal positive - do not spawn more exit variants of losing entries.

commands.lesson_title: Backfill-resolved features are survivorship-poisoned; walk-forward cannot catch feature-level bias
commands.lesson_body: holders>=250 (backfill) showed opt_avg_ret +24.25% (n=396) and Panel 7 ROBUST (degradation -0.54pp), and was recommended for deployment 5+ times. It is a pure survivorship artifact: backfill re-resolves holder count AFTER the outcome, so a token that still has 250 holders today is one that did not rug. The measured (at-graduation) version shows baseline performance (panel1 win_rate 37-39%, pump/dump ratio 0.85-1.2). Walk-forward train/test splits CANNOT detect this class of bias because both halves share the contaminated feature. Rule: never deploy a filter whose field is resolved after entry time - same class as the liq_t300 look-ahead bug (2026-05-01).

commands.lesson_title: Copy-trade shadow P&L: promising but 4 blind spots before go/no-go
commands.lesson_body: Shadow copy-trading (since ~2026-06-05) is the only approach with large-n robust positive P&L: overall n=3,128, +31.9 SOL, drop_top3 +12.0 at 0.5 SOL size; best variants copy-tp100-sl30 (+8.82, drop3 +4.23, n=211), copy-followsell (+7.77, drop3 +2.38, n=401), copy-conviction-consensus2 (+4.78, drop3 +1.46, n=108). Before any live_micro decision: (1) the ~15 exit variants share entry signals - totals are NOT independent, compare per-lead-event; (2) open positions are not marked to market - closed-only P&L has survivorship; (3) entries assume fill at pool price ~1.1s post-lead with flat 3% cost, no own-impact slippage; follow_sell exits assume fill at post-lead-sell detection price; (4) only ~5 days / one regime window observed. Evaluate on penalized + MTM + per-day numbers, not lifetime closed totals.

commands.hypothesis: Copy entries on promotable/smart lead-wallet buys with static TP100/SL30. Hypothesis: lead-wallet selection (private info) carries edge that survives a 5% exit penalty, open-position MTM, and per-day regime splits, where all public T+30 chart features failed.

Pure copy: enter on lead buy, exit on lead sell (no own TP/SL). Tests whether the lead wallet's exit timing is itself the edge. Highest n of all copy variants; median hold ~105s keeps regime exposure small.

Copy only when >=2 tracked smart wallets buy the same token (consensus filter on top of copy signal). Lower n but cleaner signal; tests whether consensus concentrates the edge enough to beat single-wallet copying per trade.

commands.note: STRATEGY REVIEW SESSION (operator-approved full package): (1) Executed the kill backlog - deleted 79 strategies (all enabled with n>=100 and drop_top3<=0, plus orphaned v48a-climb-strength-only / v50-strength pair whose edge-decay signal source v25-bot-excl-climbing was deleted). Roster goes 152 enabled -> ~75. (2) REJECTED v50-holders250-shadow (ai-2026-06-04-003 / ai-2026-06-09-003): backfill holders are survivorship-contaminated (see new lesson lesson-backfill-filters-survivorship); measured>=250 shows baseline performance. (3) Verdict on the momentum book: public T+30 chart features are exhausted (lesson-public-t30-features-exhausted) - keep velmono-dev / velmid-liq-mono / rugger-climbing on their existing watch criteria, but no new public-feature combos. (4) Copy-trading is the priority direction: +31.9 SOL / drop3 +12.0 on n=3,128 in ~5 days of shadow, but with 4 evaluation blind spots (non-independent exit variants, no MTM on open positions, optimistic fills, single regime window) - code hardening pushed to branch claude/trading-strategy-review-girtcx (exit penalty, MTM, per-day P&L, per-event paired comparison). Journal predictions registered for copy-tp100-sl30 / copy-followsell / copy-conviction-consensus2. Go/no-go on live_micro copy trading in ~14 days on penalized+MTM numbers.
